languages.text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

languages.text: 「もっと詳しい情報が必要。メッセージの内容を正確に教えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

languages.text: "Daha fazla bilgiye ihtiyacım var. Mesajda tam olarak ne dendiğini söyle."
languages.original_text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

traits.locale_text: "Daha fazla bilgiye ihtiyacım var. Mesajda tam olarak ne dendiğini söyle."

languages.text: “我需要更详尽的信息。把讯息内容一五一十地复述一遍。”
languages.original_text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

traits.locale_text: “我需要更详尽的信息。把讯息内容一五一十地复述一遍。”

languages.text: "Ich brauche mehr Informationen. Sagt mir exakt, worum es in der Nachricht ging."
languages.original_text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

traits.locale_text: "Ich brauche mehr Informationen. Sagt mir exakt, worum es in der Nachricht ging."

languages.text: « J'ai besoin d'en savoir plus. Quelle est la teneur exacte du message ? »
languages.original_text: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."

languages.text: «Necesito más información. Dígame exactamente lo que decía el mensaje».
